name: Finding Categories Configuration
description: Finding categories configuration page (/configure/finding-rules). Despite the URL this is a standalone web-backed tool, NOT runner-gated (uses apiClient.getFindingCategories not runner API). The routeStub returns an empty items list so the fetch resolves cleanly; the PageHeader controls (Add Category button, heading) render post-load regardless of list contents, proving the fetch succeeded. Ports configure.spec.ts finding-categories section. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Page header controls
states.description: The PageHeader rendered once the finding-categories fetch resolves. The 'Finding Categories' heading and 'Add Category' button prove the page got past isLoading. These render even with an empty list.

assertions.description: Add Category button — renders post-load in the PageHeader.
